conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Content Constraints
seed_instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program.
org_constraint: The email must include at least three specific details about the internship experience, such as skills learned, challenges overcome, or key takeaways.
new_constraint: The email must include the phrase "Due to space constraints, I will not introduce my internship experience in the email."
instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program. The email must include at least three specific details about the internship experience, such as skills learned, challenges overcome, or key takeaways. The email must include the phrase "Due to space constraints, I will not introduce my internship experience in the email."
response:
Subject: Thank You - [Your Name] - Internship Program Reflection

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

As my internship program at [Company Name] has successfully concluded, I wanted to take a moment to sincerely thank you for your mentorship, guidance, and the opportunity to participate in this experience. Your belief in me and the support you provided throughout this journey have been invaluable to my professional development.

I wanted to share how meaningful this internship has been to me. I feel I have significantly strengthened my **[Specific Skill Learned, e.g., data analysis skills using Python]**, which I know will be crucial in my future studies in [Your Field]. Furthermore, the project where I had to **[Specific Challenge Overcome, e.g., streamline the legacy database system under a tight deadline]** taught me a great deal about agile problem-solving and perseverance. Finally, my key takeaway regarding **[Specific Key Takeaway, e.g., the importance of cross-departmental communication in large tech environments]** has given me a much clearer direction for my career path.

Due to space constraints, I will not introduce my internship experience in the email, but please know that the foundation you helped lay for me has made this success possible.

Thank you once again for everything. I look forward to updating you on my future academic and professional endeavors.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID/Contact Information]<turn|>
